NAVAREA XIX 143/14
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 17 1830 UTC DEC 14.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 64-56.02N 007-47.50E DEEPSEA BERGEN
 71-15.57N 022-15.45E SCARABEO8

NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 131/14
